title: stenophyllus tenellus
intro: Stenophyllus tenellus, also known as Tenella, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Stenophyllus, a group of plants traditionally used in herbal medicine. The medicinal properties of Stenophyllus tenellus include its antiseptic and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of essential oils. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Stenophyllus tenellus is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and its essential oils are used in aromatherapy and topical applications.
